author: Lam
description: Private, local-first portfolio tracker with encrypted records in your vault. Track investment cash flows, returns, and S&P 500 benchmarks without an account or telemetry. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Lam
manifest.description: Private, local-first portfolio tracker. Track cash flows, valuations, returns, and benchmarks while encrypted investment records stay in your vault. No account, telemetry, or developer backend.
manifest.name: Investment Tracker

name: Investment Tracker

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Documentation in every supported language

- Added complete public documentation for English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, German, French, and Brazilian Portuguese.
- Added nine-language navigation to every localized README.
- Kept privacy, encryption, FRED network, synchronization, plaintext export, feedback, and disclaimer information consistent across all translations.

This documentation release does not change plugin behavior, ledger storage, encryption, calculations, network requests, or data formats. It contains no personal or portfolio data.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Investment Tracker 1.0.2

This release improves how Investment Tracker explains its private, local-first design and helps privacy-conscious investors discover the plugin.

### What's new

- Clearer privacy-first positioning, installation instructions, intended-use boundaries, and direct-answer FAQs.
- A full Simplified Chinese README.
- Expanded privacy and security documentation covering encryption, FRED requests, user-selected Vault sync, plaintext exports, clipboard use, visible filesystem metadata, and threat boundaries.
- Updated Obsidian and GitHub discovery metadata.

### Privacy and compatibility

- No ledger format, storage, migration, or investment-calculation behavior changed.
- No personal or portfolio data is included in this release.
- Release assets are limited to `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.
- 95 automated tests, the 9-language i18n check, release consistency check, and privacy scan all passed.

Read the [Privacy Policy](https://github.com/joelam2023/investment-tracker/blob/main/PRIVACY.md) and [Security Policy](https://github.com/joelam2023/investment-tracker/blob/main/SECURITY.md) before storing sensitive records.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Marketplace compatibility update.

- Preserves the Investment Tracker leaf location when the plugin unloads.
- Uses CSS state classes for chart tooltip visibility to satisfy Obsidian marketplace checks.
- Includes no data migration and does not change encrypted investment records.

This release contains no personal or portfolio data.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
First public release of Investment Tracker.

- Encrypted event-based investment accounting with password, recovery key, privacy masking, and configurable automatic locking.
- Account and portfolio XIRR, yearly returns, monthly Modified Dietz returns, and same-cash-flow S&P 500 comparison.
- Nine interface languages and nine supported account currencies.
- Privacy-safe bug, feature, and private security feedback paths with user-reviewed diagnostics.

See the README, PRIVACY.md, and SECURITY.md before use. Investment Tracker is a record-keeping tool, not financial advice.
